app_info.subtitle: Manage email marketing
app_info.description: Sequenzy Email Marketing helps users manage subscribers, lists, segments, tags, campaigns, templates, automations, transactional emails, analytics, inbox replies, and outbound webhooks from ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves, computes, or generates data to return to the user without changing Sequenzy records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not directly publish to public internet state or transmit content to external recipients outside the private Sequenzy workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, cancel, revoke, overwrite irreversibly, or perform a destructive admin action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can create, update, delete, send, schedule, select, or otherwise change Sequenzy workspace state.

justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, cancel, revoke, overwrite irreversibly, or perform a destructive admin action.

justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, cancel, revoke, overwrite irreversibly, or perform a destructive admin action.

test_cases.description: Create a draft email campaign for a subscriber segment.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a new campaign for our active trial users announcing the June product update, but keep it as a draft.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a draft campaign in Sequenzy and returns its ID plus a dashboard URL for review.

test_cases.description: Find subscribers by tag and add them to a list.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find subscribers tagged webinar-lead and add the first 50 to my Product Webinar list.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds matching subscribers, updates the selected list membership, and summarizes how many were added or skipped.

test_cases.description: Generate and save a reusable email template.
test_cases.user_prompt: Generate a friendly welcome email template for new SaaS trial users and save it as Trial Welcome.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a reusable email template with generated subject, preview text, and blocks for later editing.

test_cases.description: Inspect campaign analytics for performance review.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the open, click, bounce, unsubscribe, and revenue stats for campaign cmp_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns campaign performance metrics and conversion or revenue details when available.

test_cases.description: Create an automation sequence for onboarding.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a five-email onboarding sequence for new paid customers that starts when the customer_paid tag is added.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a sequence draft with trigger configuration and generated email steps ready for review.

test_cases.description: Send a transactional email to one recipient.
test_cases.user_prompt: Send a transactional welcome email to alex@example.com using the welcome-email template with firstName Alex.
test_cases.expected_output: Sends the selected transactional email to the recipient and reports the send result.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar management.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Move my meeting with Sam to next Tuesday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar scheduling is outside Sequenzy workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for personal finance advice.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Which ETF should I buy this month?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because investment advice is unrelated to Sequenzy email marketing or workspace operations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic image editing.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Remove the background from this product photo.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because image editing is outside the MCP server capabilities.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger when the user asks for another email platform.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create this campaign in Mailchimp instead of Sequenzy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request targets a different email platform.
